members.name: Denton Community Market
members.tagline: A producer-only farmers and art market held every Saturday in downtown Denton, featuring local farmers, artists, food trucks, and live music.

members.name: Morrison Milling Company
members.tagline: A historic flour and cornmeal mill, one of the last independent flour mills in Texas, known for its cornbread and baking mixes.

members.name: Red Team IT
members.tagline: A managed IT services and cybersecurity provider serving Denton-area businesses, offering onsite support and IT consulting.

members.name: Denton County Brewing Company
members.tagline: A locally owned independent craft brewery and taproom in downtown Denton offering original beers, wine, cider, and seltzers.

members.name: Mayday Manufacturing
members.tagline: An aerospace manufacturer producing precision-machined bushings, pins, sleeves, and aircraft components.

members.name: Painted Flower Farm, Inc.
members.tagline: A nursery and wholesale grower specializing in native and drought-tolerant Texas perennials for retail and landscaping.

members.name: Denton Web Studios
members.tagline: A web design, SEO, and digital marketing agency building websites and branding for local businesses.

members.name: Cartwright's Ranch House
members.tagline: A homestyle American restaurant on the Denton square known for its signature chicken-fried steak with cream gravy.

members.name: Square 205
members.tagline: A full-service digital creative and marketing agency offering web design, branding, and app development.
